title: Day 6 Revision — Has / Have
keyPointsSummary: Question: Do/Does + subject + have...? | Have/Has + subject + V3...?
Common expressions: have breakfast/lunch/dinner/a meeting/a look/a break

quickQuiz.question: Translate: क्या उसके पास bike है?
Fill: I _____ already finished the work.

mustRememberRules: don't/doesn't + have (base form, never has after doesn't)
Present Perfect question: Have/Has + subject + V3 (not Do/Does)
